~6 years of full-stack development experience specializing in front-end development with React paired with Node, Java, and/or Python back-ends and MySQL, MongoDB, and/or Neo4j databases. 

 I am currently gaining extensive experience in AI-integrated Software Engineering & Data Science as a Work-Study Apprentice at Flatiron School working on AI-powered EdTech tools with NextJS, Node, PostgreSQL / Supabase, and Python / FastAPI, with a projected graduation in April 2027.
